title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: IBM Technology explains a shift in AI labs away from maximizing model size toward intelligent routing of requests. Smart AI routing optimizes based on cost and trust factors rather than defaulting to the largest available model.
writeup: IBM Technology covers smart AI routing, a shift among AI labs away from maximizing model size toward intelligently directing requests to the appropriate model. The key takeaway is that routing optimizes on cost and trust factors rather than defaulting to the largest available model. This matters because it reframes performance gains around request-level evaluation and cost optimization instead of scale alone.
